goal: complex_conj_fn(a + b) = complex_conj_fn(a) + complex_conj_fn(b) and complex_conj_fn(a * b) = complex_conj_fn(a) * complex_conj_fn(b)

complex_conj_fn(Complex.1) = Complex.1 and forall(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(x0 + x1) = complex_conj_fn(x0) + complex_conj_fn(x1) and complex_conj_fn(x0 * x1) = complex_conj_fn(x0) * complex_conj_fn(x1) }
proof: let w0: Complex satisfy { exists(k0: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(w0 + k0) != complex_conj_fn(w0) + complex_conj_fn(k0) or complex_conj_fn(w0 * k0) != complex_conj_fn(w0) * complex_conj_fn(k0) } }
let w1: Complex satisfy { not (complex_conj_fn(w0 + w1) = complex_conj_fn(w0) + complex_conj_fn(w1) and complex_conj_fn(w0 * w1) = complex_conj_fn(w0) * complex_conj_fn(w1)) }
let w2: Complex satisfy { not (complex_conj_fn(w0 + w2) = complex_conj_fn(w0) + complex_conj_fn(w2) and complex_conj_fn(w0 * w2) = complex_conj_fn(w0) * complex_conj_fn(w2)) }
function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { complex_conj_fn(x0 + x1) = complex_conj_fn(x0) + complex_conj_fn(x1) and complex_conj_fn(x0 * x1) = complex_conj_fn(x0) * complex_conj_fn(x1) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) and x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_ring_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T0 -> T1) { not RingHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn)

goal: exists(k0: RingHom[Complex, Complex]) { RingHom.new[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn) = Option.some(k0) }

proof: let w0: Complex satisfy { complex_conj_ring_hom.hom(w0) != complex_conj_fn(w0) }

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[Complex, Complex](complex_conj_ring_hom, complex_conj_fn, w0)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn, a)

goal: compose_ring_hom[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_ring_hom, complex_conj_ring_hom).hom = compose[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_ring_hom.hom, complex_conj_ring_hom.hom)
compose_ring_hom[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_ring_hom, complex_conj_ring_hom).hom = compose[Complex, Complex, Complex](complex_conj_fn, complex_conj_fn)
